Home / Diagrams / REST Request Sequence — Per-Request Overhead

REST Request Sequence — Per-Request Overhead

📍 Used after slide 34

View JSON on GitHub ↗ ⬇ Download

Loading diagram…

⚠ Could not load diagram from GitHub. View on GitHub →

Full lifecycle of a single REST request showing DNS, TCP, TLS, HTTP overhead vs gRPC streaming.

Speaker Notes

Shows the 8-12 round trips of a single REST request. Contrast with gRPC streaming where this overhead is paid once and 1,000 messages flow back on the same connection.

Talk

Taming the JVM: Optimizing Java Workloads on OpenShift & Kubernetes

Quarkus 3.33.1 LTS  ·  Java 21 & 25
